SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.automation

Class AgenticProcessOptimizer.Constraint

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.automation.AgenticProcessOptimizer.Constraint
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
AgenticProcessOptimizer
public static final class AgenticProcessOptimizer.Constraint extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable descriptor of a hard inequality constraint.
See Also:

    Description
    private final String
    address

    private final double
    penaltyWeight
    Non-negative penalty weight multiplying the squared violation.
    private static final long
    serialVersionUID
    Serialization id.
    private final AgenticProcessOptimizer.ConstraintType

    unit
    Unit for the read-back, or null for the default.

  • Constructor Details

    • Constraint

      Constraint(String address, AgenticProcessOptimizer.ConstraintType type, double limit, String unit, double penaltyWeight)
      Creates a constraint.
      Parameters:
      address - dot-notation address
      type - comparison direction
      limit - the limit value
      unit - unit or null
      penaltyWeight - non-negative penalty weight

  • Method Details

    • violation

      double violation(double value)
      Computes the constraint violation magnitude (zero if satisfied).
      Parameters:
      value - the read-back value
      Returns:
      the non-negative violation magnitude
